source: symbol.army SymbolEditorPreviewAsBinary imageFormat=Svg, decoded from Image.ImageAsBinary base64
note: v387 replaces all packaged MIL-STD selector SVG artwork with symbol.army-generated SVGs. Some unsupported/questionable SIDCs still render as text-only fallbacks such as CIV, but the prior baked-in question-mark placeholder artwork has been eliminated from the packaged SVGs.
